title: Character Card V4
description: Top-level schema for the Character Card V4 specification, defining the complete structure of a character card including metadata, character data, and optional assets.

spec.title: Specification
spec.description: Identifier for the specification this card conforms to.

spec_version.title: Specification Version
spec_version.description: The version of the Character Card specification this card uses.

meta.title: Card Metadata
meta.description: Metadata about the card including creator information, timestamps, and signatures.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Media assets associated with this character card, such as icons, backgrounds, and emotion sprites.
